title: Elekta Software Development Intern Interview Questions & Practice
metaDescription: Ace your Elekta Software Development Intern interview with AI-powered practice questions and feedback. Get ready for your San Jose, CA internship.
content:
# Elekta Software Development Intern Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Elekta Software Development Intern internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** San Jose, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Elekta
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Elekta is offering a Software Development Intern internship position in San Jose, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Elekta's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Elekta interview and increase your chances of success.
